ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was established */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the company's CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the company's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the director */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the director */,
  "filmography" INTEGER /* Number of films directed */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works (comma-separated) */,
  "awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards won */,
  "nominations" INTEGER /* Number of nominations received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the writer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the writer */,
  "filmography" INTEGER /* Number of films written */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works (comma-separated) */,
  "awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards won */,
  "nominations" INTEGER /* Number of nominations received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the actor */,
  "filmography" INTEGER /* Number of films acted in */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works (comma-separated) */,
  "awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards won */,
  "nominations" INTEGER /* Number of nominations received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" TEXT /* Parent genre if applicable (e.g., Action -> Action/Adventure) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on audience and critic reception */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Current trend (e.g., rising, falling, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
column_names: Country where the company is based
Links to the company's social media profiles
Year of birth of the director
Year of birth of the writer
Year of birth of the actor
Parent genre if applicable (e.g., Action -> Action/Adventure)
Popularity score based on audience and critic reception
